name: vision-review
description: Open-source module for structured review of circadian activity PNG plots with OpenAI vision models.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace client && npm run typecheck --workspace server
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test
